message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate collections, functools, glob, hashlib to ZigBuilder

- collections_mod.zig: Migrate defaultdict, OrderedDict, UserDict, UserList,
  Counter, Deque, ChainMap, CounterTotal to use emitInlineBlockStart/End
- functools_mod.zig: Migrate partial, reduce to use emitInlineBlockStart/End
- glob_mod.zig: Migrate genGlob to use emitInlineBlockStart/End with inner loop label
- hashlib_mod.zig: Migrate genNew to use emitInlineBlockStart/End

Progress: 39 files remaining (down from 43)
